Notice And Motion To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Pltf'S Demand For Inspection Of Documents And To Produce All Responsive Documents And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,040.00
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., (310) 858-9771, Specially appearing for plaintiff

RULING:

HEARING HELD:(1) Plaintiff's To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Demand For Inspection Of Documents (Set One) And To Produce All Responsive Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Party to respond within 5 days of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $240 to be paid within 20 days of notice of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions In The Amount
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., (310) 858-9771, Specially appearing for plaintiff

RULING:

HEARING HELD:Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories (Set One), And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Party to respond within 5 days of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $440 to be paid within 20 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
